title: Task outcome: **중요:** 복구만 됐을 뿐 코드 원인은 아직 남아 있습니다. UUID 기반 ID, 단일 쓰기 직렬화, 임시 파일 후 atomic rename, SQLite busy 재시
summary: Eliminated the reproduced DinoBrain multi-process operation-state corruption path. Added millisecond plus full UUID IDs, atomic fsync-and-rename JSON writes, cross-process owner locks with stale-lock heartbeat and Windows EPERM/EACCES contention handling, locked JSONL append/read, serialized operations-index read-modify-write with automatic malformed-index rebuild, SQLite WAL/busy timeout/bounded retry under the shared operations lock, and structured hook MCP error handling. Added a real multi-process MCP regression test and pushed commit 9682f47 to origin/main.
claim: Task outcome for dinobrain: Eliminated the reproduced DinoBrain multi-process operation-state corruption path. Added millisecond plus full UUID IDs, atomic fsync-and-rename JSON writes, cross-process owner locks with stale-lock heartbeat and Windows EPERM/EACCES contention handling, locked JSONL append/read, serialized operations-index read-modify-write with automatic malformed-index rebuild, SQLite WAL/busy timeout/bounded retry under the shared operations lock, and structured hook MCP error handling. Added a real multi-process MCP regression test and pushed commit 9682f47 to origin/main.
request:
**중요:** 복구만 됐을 뿐 코드 원인은 아직 남아 있습니다. UUID 기반 ID, 단일 쓰기 직렬화, 임시 파일 후 atomic rename, SQLite busy 재시도, 병렬 회귀 테스트가 들어가기 전까지 10개 에이전트 같은 병렬 작업에서 재발할 수 있습니다. 이번에는 분석만 진행했고 코드는 수정하지 않았습니다.

이부분 다시는 발생하지 않게 수정
decisions: Use full UUID plus millisecond timestamp for task, Context Pack, candidate, quarantine, gate, and feedback IDs.
Serialize every operations-index read-modify-write across processes with an owner-verified file lock.
Write JSON through a same-directory temporary file, fsync it, validate it, atomically rename it, and validate the destination.
Treat Windows EPERM and EACCES on an existing lock as contention and retry instead of failing closed.
Use a heartbeat so long-running rebuilds cannot be mistaken for stale locks.
Run operations SQLite in WAL mode with a five-second busy timeout, bounded retry, and the shared operations lock.
Automatically rebuild a malformed derived operations index while preserving source task, trace, pack, and event records.
Exclude the pre-existing package-lock.json modification from the commit.
next_steps: Restart any already-running long-lived Codex MCP process so direct MCP calls load commit 9682f47; new hook subprocesses already use the rebuilt dist.
Keep npm run index:verify:concurrency in release and installer verification.

evidence.snippet: Eliminated the reproduced DinoBrain multi-process operation-state corruption path. Added millisecond plus full UUID IDs, atomic fsync-and-rename JSON writes, cross-process owner locks with stale-lock heartbeat and Windows EPERM/EACCES contention handling, locked JSONL append/read, serialized operations-index read-modify-write with automatic malformed-index rebuild, SQLite WAL/busy timeout/bounded retry under the shared operations lock, and structured hook MCP error handling. Added a real multi-process MCP regression test and pushed commit 9682f47 to origin/main.
